scenarios.testCase: BVT verifies application ui remains reachable after AdminRecycleBinPanel.tsx
scenarios.precondition: Core Platform local stack is available and seeded test credentials can sign in.
scenarios.steps: Open Admin application -> fill the login details -> click Login -> navigate to Recycle Bin from the sidebar -> open Recycle Bin, restore the test row, and verify it returns -> verify the page or table result
scenarios.expected: The critical impacted surface remains reachable and authenticated behavior is intact.
scenarios.proof: Graph evidence (git-diff) identifies this as critical impact.
